title: SonicWall High Availability State Machine and Failover Events (SonicWall)
spl:
index=netops sourcetype="dell:sonicwall" earliest=-7d
| where match(_raw,"(?i)High Availability|HA |Active|Idle|heartbeat")
| stats count values(_raw) as msgs latest(_time) as last by host, ha_peer
| sort -last
description: Missed HA failovers leave a false sense of redundancy. Event monitoring validates that standby units actually take over.
value: Protects revenue and remote access during hardware failure or maintenance.
implementation: Label units by cluster ID. Alert on flapping roles within 15 minutes.
visualization: Timeline (HA state), table (unit, role, last failover).

references.title: Splunkbase — Dell SonicWall Add-on for Splunk
Splunk Connect for Syslog — Dell SonicWall reference

grandmaExplanation: Missed HA failovers leave a false sense of redundancy — we monitor SonicWall logs so teams can act before users feel pain.
